improvement: Added a machine-verifiable contract for the cloudflare-research GitHub environment, required secret names, minimum Pages permission, non-logging policy, deployment workflow, project identity, and required verification outcomes.

verification.method: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical authored files

limits: The GitHub environment and secrets were not inspected or configured.
No hostname resolution or served-commit proof was obtained.
The repository commit currently has unrelated Vercel build-rate-limit failures.
Infrastructure evidence does not establish scientific or medical truth.
privacy_boundary: Secret values are neither represented nor permitted in logs; only names, required capability, and verification outcomes are recorded.
falsification_route: Mutate the declared secret set, token permission, logging policy, project identity, workflow identity, or verification requirements and run the validator tests; dispatch the deployment workflow after configuration and require final evidence acceptance before marking C-001 complete.
